title: SkillSpec Contract
description: Package-owned semantic contract for skills that steer agent behavior while the CLI performs robust state inspection, mutation, validation, and reporting.

rule.description: Operating rule that explains how SkillSpec relates skills, CLI commands, fallback guidance, and generated targets.

specs.description: Ordered skill contracts that can be consumed by hand-authored skills, references, or later generators.

non_empty_string.description: Non-empty text used in SkillSpec fields.

path.description: Dot-path or selector path in a CLI JSON output that a skill is expected to inspect.

decision.description: Agent decision answered by this field.

fallback_when_missing.description: Conservative behavior when the field is absent or the output is unavailable.

field_ref.description: CLI output field interpreted by a skill.

path.description: Repo-relative surface owned, read, or mutated under this skill contract.

authority.description: Authority role the skill assigns to the surface.

edit_rule.description: How an agent should change or avoid changing this surface.

surface.description: Workspace surface governed by the skill.

command.description: CLI command name or subcommand path.

preferred_invocation.description: Preferred invocation shape, including format expectations when relevant.

purpose.description: Situation where the skill should prefer this command over raw file inspection or manual mutation.

mutates_state.description: True when the command is expected to write workspace state.

key_output_fields.description: CLI output fields the skill should interpret.

decisions_answered.description: Agent decisions this command is expected to make cheaper or safer.

failure_fallback.description: Conservative fallback if the command is unavailable or fails before producing usable output.

cli_command.description: CLI affordance used by a skill.

no_artifact_by_default.description: Whether routine use of this skill should avoid creating review, planning, memory, or handoff artifacts.

artifact_creation_allowed_when.description: Conditions that justify durable artifact creation.

ordinary_work_rule.description: Rule for keeping low-risk or direct work lightweight.

proportionality.description: Proportionality and artifact policy for the skill.

status.description: Current readiness of this skill contract for generated target output.

must_preserve.description: Semantics that any generated or adapter-specific surface must preserve.

deferred_until.description: Condition that must be satisfied before renderer or target-adapter work begins.

generated_target_requirements.description: Constraints for future generated skill or adapter surfaces.

status.description: Lifecycle status for this skill contract.

applies_when.description: Conditions that should route an agent to this skill behavior.

proportionality.description: Artifact and proportionality policy for this skill.

preferred_cli_commands.description: CLI commands the skill should prefer when available.

interpreted_output_fields.description: Output fields that drive skill decisions.

owned_surfaces.description: Repo surfaces this skill may read, route to, or ask the CLI to mutate.

allowed_actions.description: Actions permitted under this skill contract.

forbidden_actions.description: Actions this skill must not instruct or normalize.

fallback_when_cli_unavailable.description: Conservative behavior when the preferred CLI cannot be used.

proof_obligations.description: Validation or inspection obligations before claiming the skill-guided work is correct.

closeout_obligations.description: Continuation and completion obligations before the agent reports done.

generated_target_requirements.description: Requirements for future generated projections of the skill.
